title: Croatian Pork Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Croatia, made with tender pork and a blend of herbs.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the carrots and potatoes, cook for 5 minutes.
Add the Croatian paprika, salt, and pepper, stir to combine.
Return the pork to the pot, add enough stock to cover, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 2 hours.
Check the pork for tenderness, and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
